mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY POST_ID DESC) AS RN, POST_ID, CATEGORY_ID, TITLE, CONTENTS, VIEW_COUNT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, USER_ID FROM B_BOARD ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{size}
SELECT POST_ID, CATEGORY_ID, TITLE, CONTENTS, VIEW_COUNT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, USER_ID FROM B_BOARD WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO B_BOARD ( POST_ID, CATEGORY_ID, TITLE, CONTENTS, USER_ID ) VALUES ( B_BOARD_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{contents}, #{userId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE B_BOARD SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENTS = #{contents}, CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
